title: Preferred Path
description: Specifies costing information for mobs that prefer to walk on preferred paths.

preferred_path_blocks.title: Preferred Path Blocks
preferred_path_blocks.description:
A list of block types with their associated pathfinding costs. Each entry specifies blocks and their cost value.

Properties:
• cost (int)
• blocks (string[])

Sample values:
• iron_golem: [{"blocks":["grass_path"],"cost":0},{"blocks":[...

cost.description: The cost value for these blocks during pathfinding. Lower costs make paths more preferred.

blocks.description: Array of block identifiers that share this cost value.

default_block_cost.title: Default Block Cost
default_block_cost.description:
Cost for non-preferred blocks

Sample values:
• iron_golem: 1.5

jump_cost.title: Jump Cost
jump_cost.description:
Added cost for jumping up a node

Sample values:
• iron_golem: 5

max_fall_blocks.title: Max Fall Blocks
max_fall_blocks.description:
Distance mob can fall without taking damage

Sample values:
• iron_golem: 1
• warden: 20
